title: Pronephrium repandum
taxonomy: Pronephrium repandum is classified within the plant family Dennstaedtiaceae, a group of ferns commonly known as the rattlesort ferns or wood ferns. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other fern species. Pronephrium repandum belongs to the genus Pronephrium, a group of ferns that are native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The species is further divided into several subspecies based on geographical variations and morphological differences. Pronephrium repandum is also classified within the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants that includes all ferns and their allies.
